capabilities.name: Global block CRUD

capabilities.notes: Dual surface complete: admin UI + in-module skill seed (was migration-seeded only). Live-verified 2026-07-07 via MCP gateway: list/get/update/toggle all work.

capabilities.name: Reuse across pages
capabilities.verify: useGlobalBlocks.ts; PublicNavigation.tsx + PublicFooter.tsx render global blocks on every public page
capabilities.notes: Skill surface now in module skillSeeds (manage_global_blocks, 2026-07-07); rendering via useGlobalBlocks on every public page.

capabilities.name: Edit once, update everywhere
capabilities.verify: single global_blocks row per slot; edits in GlobalBlocksPage.tsx propagate to all pages via useGlobalBlocks
capabilities.notes: Skill surface now in module skillSeeds (manage_global_blocks, 2026-07-07); single row per slot propagates everywhere.

capabilities.name: Block categories
capabilities.verify: global_blocks.category (nullable text, 20260704150500 migration); Library tab in GlobalBlocksPage.tsx with free-text category input (datalist suggestions from existing values) + category filter; manage_global_blocks handler in agent-execute supports category on list (filter) and update (set)
capabilities.notes: Live-verified 2026-07-07 via MCP gateway: update slot=header category='site-chrome' → filtered list returns it → reverted. Free-text categories, no taxonomy table by design.
